untranslatable_reason: Central bank/institutional intervention detection requires external news feed or order book imbalance data not available in standard OHLCV indicators. The signal relies on detecting 'public statements or observable large bid/ask imbalance against trend' which cannot be expressed using only price action, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, or bar properties. Substituted vol_ratio_20 spike as proxy for intervention-driven market disruption, but this is imperfect.
translation_notes: Signal is context-dependent (applies to both long and short trends). Entry requires trend confirmation via ADX > 25 (20+ bars of directional movement). Exit uses elevated volume ratio as proxy for intervention-driven market dislocation/regime change, since true intervention detection is not available in allowed indicators. A production system would need external data feeds for central bank statement detection or real-time order flow analysis.
